raw_consumer_statement:
I am submitting this complaint regarding American Expresss handling of my fraud dispute and subsequent financial review. 

I reported unauthorized activity on my American Express account and provided a police report as requested. During a recorded call with an American Express representative, I was accused of submitting a false police report, informed that responsibility for charges was determined based on patterns, and denied a transaction-level, line-by-line review. 

I was later advised by American Express XXXX XXXX XXXX that I have the right to review disputed charges individually. Despite this, my account was restricted and placed on a preset spending limit while the fraud dispute remained unresolved and while a financial review was initiated. 

I am cooperating fully with the financial review ; however, I object to American Express commingling the financial review process with a fraud determination. A financial review should not be used to deny or pre-judge a fraud dispute or to assign responsibility without an itemized review. 

I am requesting : A written, transaction-level review identifying which charges American Express considers authorized versus disputed Written clarification of the basis for any claim that my police report is false Assurance that my rights under the Fair Credit Billing Act are honored and that account restrictions do not prejudice my fraud dispute I am seeking a fair, documented resolution consistent with federal consumer protection requirements.
